overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character sitting on a bench at a train station during a thunderstorm in Saint Denis, then standing up and walking down wet cobblestone streets past horse-drawn carriages and historic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered train station platform with wooden benches

events.description: tram passes by in the background moving from left to right
on-screen text 'Thunderstorm in Saint Denis' appears indicating weather status

agents.ego_description: sitting on a wooden bench under the station canopy, examining a newspaper or map in his hands

notable_agents.action: tram moving slowly across the background from left to right

entered.detail: long wooden slatted bench with curved metal armrests
metal roof structure with decorative scalloped edge and white support columns
multi-story stone building with arched windows illuminated by warm interior light
dark colored street tram with glowing windows moving along tracks
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character sits on a wooden bench under a covered station canopy during a thunderstorm. The camera orbits around him as a tram passes in the background, and rain falls heavily on the cobblestone street beyond the shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: station platform edge overlooking cobblestone street

events.description: character stands up from the bench and prepares to walk

agents.ego_description: sitting and observing the rainy street, looking around before standing up from the bench

entered.detail: illuminated sign for the Port of Saint Denis visible across the street
wooden wagon cart with crates parked near the curb
discarded newspaper left on the bench seat

segments.scene_description: The camera continues to orbit the sitting character from behind as he surveys the rainy street. The Port of Saint Denis sign becomes visible across the cobblestone road. The character then stands up from the bench, ready to depart.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet cobblestone street with tram tracks and Victorian buildings

events.description: character walks out from under the covered platform into the open rain
character walks past a stationary horse-drawn carriage on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking down the wet cobblestone street following a horse-drawn carriage in the rain

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving slowly down the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: wet reflective cobblestone road surface with rain puddles
wooden building with red sign reading Victoria Street Station
black enclosed carriage with large wooden wheels pulled by a horse
raised wooden boardwalk in front of storefronts
metal rails embedded in the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: The character walks out from under the shelter into the pouring rain, following a horse-drawn carriage down the wet cobblestone street. He passes by the Victoria Street Station building with its illuminated red sign, walking along wooden sidewalks as gas lamps light the misty night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in the sheltered stillness of a train station and transitions into a rainy walk through the atmospheric streets of Saint Denis. It begins by orbiting a character sitting on a wooden bench under a station canopy, while a tram passes in the background amidst a heavy downpour on the cobblestones. As the camera continues its arc from behind, the Port of Saint Denis sign emerges across the road before the character stands up to depart. The scene then shifts as he steps out from the shelter into the pouring rain, following a horse-drawn carriage down the wet street. Finally, the camera tracks him past the illuminated red sign of the Victoria Street Station, moving along wooden sidewalks lit by gas lamps in the misty night.
